revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:23 صفر]] [[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۳ صفر]] [[id:23 Safar]] [[pnb:23 صفر]] [[sd:23 صفر]] [[ur:23 صفر]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:23 صفر]] [[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۳ صفر]] [[id:23 Safar]] [[pnb:23 صفر]] [[sd:23 صفر]] [[ur:23 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Safar}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 23''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:23 صفر]] [[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۳ صفر]] [[id:23 Safar]] [[pnb:23 صفر]] [[sd:23 صفر]] [[ur:23 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Islamic Safar}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 23''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:23 صفر]] [[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۳ صفر]] [[id:23 Safar]] [[pnb:23 صفر]] [[sd:23 صفر]] [[ur:23 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121254)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 صفر]][[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]][[fa:۲۳ صفر]][[id:23 Safar]][[ms:23 Safar]][[pnb:23 صفر]][[sd:23 صفر]][[ur:23 صفر]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 صفر]][[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]][[fa:۲۳ صفر]][[id:23 Safar]][[ms:23 Safar]][[pnb:23 صفر]][[sd:23 صفر]][[ur:23 صفر]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:23 صفر]][[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]][[fa:۲۳ صفر]][[id:23 Safar]][[ms:23 Safar]][[pnb:23 صفر]][[sd:23 صفر]][[ur:23 صفر]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Safar}}
'''Safar 23''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 23rd day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 23 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:23 صفر]] [[ckb:٢٣ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۳ صفر]] [[id:23 Safar]] [[pnb:23 صفر]] [[sd:23 صفر]] [[ur:23 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}} [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]{{wikidata link|Q4121254}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]
